parameters.apprise_url_plus: voipms://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.email_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.from_phone_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own VoIPms destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise voipms:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

email_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's VoIPms email

from_phone_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's VoIPms from phone

password_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's VoIPms password

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's VoIPms targets
